cork-protected-loop.name: Cork Protected Loop — vbUSDC/sUSDe
cork-protected-loop.description: Leveraged vbUSDC positions using Cork Swap Tokens for depeg insurance. Deposit vbUSDC + cST as collateral, borrow sUSDe. Atomic liquidation via Cork exercise path: REF + cST → sUSDe.

origin-arm-weth.name: Origin ARM / WETH
origin-arm-weth.description: Borrow WETH against Origin's stETH ARM LP tokens. Leveraged looping (multiply) available.

ag-eth-triad.name: AG ETH / USDC / WBTC
ag-eth-triad.description: Cross-margin ETH, USDC, and WBTC markets on Ethereum mainnet. Borrow any of the three against the other two as collateral. Shares the Origin ARM WETH borrow vault. Curated by Alpha Growth.
